# Zabbix Query

## Overview

gSage AI тАФ Zabbix read-only query tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `zabbix_query` | Query Zabbix monitoring: host inventory, active problems, metric history, health snapshots and maintenance windows | `zabbix:read` | тАФ | тАФ |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** тАФ you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below тАФ set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "url": "<value>"
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "skip_version_check": false,
  "timeout": 30,
  "url": "<value>",
  "username": "<value>",
  "verify_tls": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `password` | `string` | тАФ | тЬУ | тАФ | Zabbix password (used together with 'username'). |
| `skip_version_check` | `boolean` | тАФ | тАФ | `false` | Skip zabbix-utils API version compatibility check (default: false). Enable for Zabbix 8.x or other versions newer than what the library has been tested with. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | тАФ | тАФ | `30` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `token` | `string` | тАФ | тЬУ | тАФ | Zabbix API token (preferred auth method). Generated in User settings тЖТ API tokens. |
| `url` | `string` | тЬУ | тАФ | тАФ | Zabbix frontend URL (e.g. https://zabbix.example.com). Must be accessible from the mcp-server container. |
| `username` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | Zabbix username (used when 'token' is not set). |
| `verify_tls` | `boolean` | тАФ | тАФ | `true` | Verify the server TLS certificate (default: true). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__PASSWORD` | `password` | `string` | тАФ | тЬУ | Zabbix password (used together with 'username'). |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__SKIP_VERSION_CHECK` | `skip_version_check` | `boolean` | `false` | тАФ | Skip zabbix-utils API version compatibility check (default: false). Enable for Zabbix 8.x or other versions newer than what the library has been tested with. |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | тАФ | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__TOKEN` | `token` | `string` | тАФ | тЬУ | Zabbix API token (preferred auth method). Generated in User settings тЖТ API tokens. |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__URL` | `url` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | Zabbix frontend URL (e.g. https://zabbix.example.com). Must be accessible from the mcp-server container. |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__USERNAME` | `username` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | Zabbix username (used when 'token' is not set). |
| `TOOL_ZABBIX_QUERY__VERIFY_TLS` | `verify_tls` | `boolean` | `true` | тАФ | Verify the server TLS certificate (default: true). |
